message:
test(core): add DPOR and lab-runtime tests for reconnect and pane-restart scenarios

- distributed_merge_dpor: verify reconnect replay fills sequence gaps
  and produces contiguous accepted output without duplicates
- tailer_labruntime: verify sync_tailers correctly handles pane removal
  and addition without resurrecting removed panes
- web_streaming_dpor: verify subscriber disconnect/reconnect delivers
  ordered suffix to reconnected subscriber and full stream to
  always-connected subscriber

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
